roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on San Francisco Pretrial Diversion Project Supervision
DEFT MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PC1538,5 FILED
/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH7 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 31D/CTS 31/VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/SAORD/SA2:INTERSECTION OF 8TH ST & MISSION ST, SF CA/SAORD4:NO LOITERING/

/X:AMENDED MINUTE ORDER 03-01-21/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE'SORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 7 32PC , AMISDEMEANOR, GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:7/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DAWT/X:ACM RECOMMENDS RELEASE/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THENEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/RX/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE OF 02-26-21 IN M09 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPC/

/CAL:I & A, P & C/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-17-21 (30TH)/987,2/BAIL:20,000/SAORD/SA2:INTERSECTION OF 8TH ST & MARKET ST, SF CA/SAORD3/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/DEF: REFUSES TO COME TO COURT TODAY/X: COURT APPOINTS THE PUBLIC DEFENDER ON A PROVISIONAL BASIS/BAIL: 20,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT AND PLEA/TWA/
